sagemaker.featuregroup.s3storageconfig.C: The Amazon Simple Storage (Amazon S3) location and and security configuration for `OfflineStore`.

sagemaker.featuregroup.s3storageconfig.K.Description: The AWS Key Management Service (KMS) key ARN of the key used to encrypt any objects written into the `OfflineStore` S3 location.  The IAM `roleARN` that is passed as a parameter to `CreateFeatureGroup` must have below permissions to the `KmsKeyId`:  +  `"kms:GenerateDataKey"`

sagemaker.featuregroup.s3storageconfig.S.Description: The S3 URI, or location in Amazon S3, of `OfflineStore`.  S3 URIs have a format similar to the following: `s3://example-bucket/prefix/`.
